# QV Girls Basketball Boosters

> The QV Girls Basketball Boosters is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit supporting the Quaker Valley High School girls basketball program in Sewickley, Pennsylvania. We raise funds for gear, tournament fees, team meals, senior nights, and the things that make a season feel like a season. The program competes in the WPIAL (Western Pennsylvania Interscholastic Athletic League).

Key facts:
- Location: Sewickley, PA 15143 (Quaker Valley School District)
- Mascot / team name: Quakers
- 501(c)(3) registered nonprofit; donations may be tax-deductible
- Donations accepted via Venmo (@qvgirlsbasketball) and corporate sponsorship tiers ranging from $100 (Super Fan) to $1,500 (Elite Team)
- Recent recognition: Mimi Thiero named Post-Gazette Player of the Year and PA All-State

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/): Program overview, current season highlights, ways to support
- [Donate](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/donate): Venmo QR code, sponsorship tiers and benefits, full sponsor recognition list
- [Sponsors](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/sponsors): 2025-2026 season sponsor recognition wall organized by giving tier
- [Schedule](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/schedule): Game schedule, results, and venue information
- [Gallery](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/gallery): Team and game photos
- [News](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/news): Season recaps, player honors, sponsor announcements
- [Contact](https://www.qvgirlsbasketball.org/contact): Email and inquiry form for sponsorship and general questions
